role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of linguistic cues (no signs) and abstained from assessment.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, soil color (laterite), and vegetation type (Cerrado/scrub).
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed plant morphology (stunted trees, grasses) and biome classification.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Evaluated road markings, chevron signs, and guardrail standards.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain evidence and used camera generation quality as a heuristic.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Brazil by leveraging the specific combination of Cerrado vegetation and Brazilian-standard road infrastructure (chevrons/guardrails). The agents stayed within their domains, and the tournament logic was sound.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Correctly described red soil and scrubby hills.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Correctly identified the chevron signs and guardrails.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Correctly noted the visual style of the image.
